|desc=Cheren sent out {{p|Samurott}} to cut down a tree that Arata was hiding in. Later, when two Team Plasma grunts arrived with their ambition to catch {{p|Keldeo}}, Cheren had Samurott battle their {{p|Eelektross}}. Despite being quicker than its foe, Samurott was rendered useless when it jumped in the way of Eelektross from harming Arata and Keldeo.

None of Samurott's moves are known.}}
